description: Following a fault, the FLISR system must automatically create a switching plan to isolate the fault and restore power to as many customers as possible.

nodes.task_description: Identify the faulted line segment that needs to be isolated.

expected_outcome.value: System confirms the target segment from the fault location analysis.

nodes.task_description: Identify available backfeed sources from adjacent feeders that can power the unfaulted sections.

expected_outcome.value: System finds an adjacent feeder with 2 MVA of available capacity.

nodes.task_description: Generate a sequence of switching operations (open/close) to isolate the fault and reroute power.

expected_outcome.value: System produces a valid, no-violation switching plan.

nodes.task_description: Execute the switching plan by sending commands to the automated switches in the field.

expected_outcome.value: System successfully operates the field devices to restore power to 90% of the affected customers.
